host.description: Fully qualified domain name for Huginn, like 'huginn.example.org'

lets_encrypt.title: Let's Encrypt certificate
lets_encrypt.description: Request a valid Let's Encrypt certificate for the host name.

http2https.title: HTTP to HTTPS redirection
http2https.description: Redirect all HTTP requests to HTTPS.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: IANA timezone used by Huginn, like 'Europe/Berlin'.

smtp_host.title: SMTP server
smtp_host.description: Mail relay host. Used only when no cluster smarthost is configured. Leave empty to disable manual mail settings.

smtp_port.title: SMTP port
smtp_port.description: Mail relay TCP port (commonly 587 for STARTTLS or 25).

smtp_username.title: SMTP username
smtp_username.description: Authentication user for the mail relay (optional).

smtp_password.title: SMTP password
smtp_password.description: Authentication password for the mail relay (optional).

smtp_starttls.title: SMTP STARTTLS
smtp_starttls.description: Use STARTTLS to encrypt the connection to the mail relay.

smtp_ssl_verify.title: Verify TLS certificate
smtp_ssl_verify.description: Verify the mail relay's TLS certificate. Disable for internal relays (e.g. the cluster smarthost) whose certificate is not valid for their address.

smtp_from.title: Sender address
smtp_from.description: From address used for outgoing mail. Defaults to huginn@<domain>.
